label: Unsupervised learning

node.label: Unsupervised learning
node.definition: Structure is discovered without task labels through density, clustering, reconstruction, or factorization.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Unsupervised learning is to connect Datasets, sampling & splits, Latent variables & hidden state to downstream capabilities including Semi-supervised & weak supervision, Self-supervised learning, Causal representation learning.
limitations: The chosen learning signal and interaction pattern may not match the deployment objective or data-generating process. Its direct dependencies include Datasets, sampling & splits, Latent variables & hidden state.

dependencies.rationale: Unsupervised learning uses Datasets, sampling & splits as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Unsupervised learning uses Latent variables & hidden state as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Unsupervised learning uses Probability theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.

sentence_units.text: Structure is discovered without task labels through density, clustering, reconstruction, or factorization.

The role of Unsupervised learning is to connect Datasets, sampling & splits, Latent variables & hidden state to downstream capabilities including Semi-supervised & weak supervision, Self-supervised learning, Causal representation learning.

The chosen learning signal and interaction pattern may not match the deployment objective or data-generating process. Its direct dependencies include Datasets, sampling & splits, Latent variables & hidden state.
Unsupervised learning uses Datasets, sampling & splits as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Unsupervised learning uses Latent variables & hidden state as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Unsupervised learning uses Probability theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
